playbook.intent: Once a year (or semi-annually for high-growth orgs), audit our delivery practice across all active projects, identify top systemic friction, and ship a concrete improvement program for the next cycle.
playbook.scope: Once a year (or semi-annually for high-growth orgs), audit our delivery practice across all active projects, identify top systemic friction, and ship a concrete improvement program for the next cycle.

success-criteria.criterion: Portfolio rollup covers 100% of active projects
Top-5 systemic friction list with cost

stage.name: Portfolio rollup
stage.intent: See the whole delivery picture before judging.

tasks.task: Roll up EVM across all active projects
Pull velocity + risk + lessons aggregates
Map active projects on a complexity × maturity grid

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the rollup covers 100% of active projects.

stage.name: Friction inventory
stage.intent: List the friction that recurs across projects.

tasks.task: Cluster lessons-learned across the year
Identify top 5 systemic friction patterns
Tag each as people / process / tooling

stage.decision-gate: Advance when each friction pattern is named with frequency + cost.

stage.name: Maturity rating
stage.intent: Rate ourselves against a delivery maturity rubric.

tasks.task: Apply the PMI performance-domains lens
Self-rate each domain on a 1-5 maturity scale
Get one independent reviewer to challenge the ratings

stage.decision-gate: Advance when ratings are challenged and revised.

stage.name: AI-leverage scan
stage.intent: Audit where AI tooling could shift the curve.

tasks.task: List PM tasks currently consuming the most time
Score each for AI augmentation potential
Identify the top 3 candidate workflows

stage.decision-gate: Advance when 3 candidate workflows are named with effort × payoff.

stage.name: Improvement program
stage.intent: Convert friction + AI opportunities into a 6-12 month plan.

tasks.task: Pick the top 3 friction items to attack
Pick the top 1-2 AI experiments
Sequence them with named owners + budget

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the plan has owners + budget + start dates.

stage.name: Communicate + commit
stage.intent: Ship the plan publicly inside the org.

tasks.task: Present the maturity review to leadership
Publish a one-page summary to the delivery org
Schedule a mid-cycle progress checkpoint

stage.decision-gate: Advance when leadership signs off on the program.

stage.name: Mid-cycle checkpoint

tasks.task: Hold a mid-cycle review against named milestones
Adjust the program based on what is and is not working
Document interim wins + setbacks

stage.decision-gate: Required: a written mid-cycle check at month 6.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content annual-delivery-process-maturity-review --format md, agent: faion get-content annual-delivery-process-maturity-review --format context, json: faion get-content annual-delivery-process-maturity-review --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial v2 playbook drafted from F-059-063 chunk-04, role-manager-manager'}]
